case_title: GUALBERTO NIC CAMARA VS. MANOS NOUVEAU LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMARA, GUALBERTO NIC AS TO DEFENDANT MANOS NOUVEAU LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMARA, GUALBERTO NIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANOS NOUVEAU LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $26,430.04 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,880.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
